Address: 2nd Floor, Vishwakarma Complex, Khemi Sati Road, Gandhi Chowk, Jhunjhunu, Rajasthan 333001

Insights: 4.4/5 Google rating with 170 reviews — highest review count in Jhunjhunu. Established 1994 — the oldest gym in the entire Jhunjhunu district dataset. Located at Gandhi Chowk — city centre junction.
